overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a hooded character holding a torch while exploring a dark, rainy medieval village at night. The character walks along stone church walls, through muddy village paths between thatched huts, and finally enters a stone cottage to explore its interior.

events.description: rounding the corner of the stone church, revealing the open village and stormy sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone church wall while holding a lit torch

entered.detail: tall stone wall with weathered texture and wooden scaffolding attached
stone cross atop the church roof visible against the stormy sky
low stone wall ruins alongside the path
wooden construction scaffolding leaning against the church wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the exterior wall of a medieval stone church, holding a torch that illuminates the weathered stone and wooden scaffolding. The scene is dark and stormy with limited visibility as the character rounds the corner of the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village center with standing stone obelisk

events.description: rain begins falling heavily as the character approaches the tall stone obelisk

agents.ego_description: walking through the open village center toward a tall stone tower while rain begins to fall

entered.detail: tall narrow stone tower rising from the village center
medieval hut with conical thatched roof
simple wooden fence marking property boundaries

segments.scene_description: Moving into the open village center, the character approaches a tall stone obelisk while rain begins to fall more heavily. Thatched-roof huts and wooden fences line the muddy path as storm clouds fill the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley between thatched cottages

events.description: turning right to approach the entrance of a stone cottage

agents.ego_description: navigating between village huts in the rain, approaching a stone building entrance

entered.detail: small stone building with wooden door and steps
large woven wicker baskets stacked near the doorway
white cloth laundry hanging on a line between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character moves through narrow pathways between thatched-roof cottages, passing wicker baskets and hanging laundry while rain continues to fall. The path leads toward a stone cottage entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval cottage interior with storage chests

events.description: entering the stone cottage from the rainy exterior into the dim interior
turning around to survey the room interior with the torch

agents.ego_description: entering the building and exploring the dimly lit interior while holding the torch

entered.detail: large ornate wooden storage chest with metal fittings
red patterned woven rug covering the wooden floor
dark doorway leading to another room or the exterior
rough stone walls of the cottage interior

segments.scene_description: The character enters the stone cottage, leaving the rain behind, and explores the dim interior illuminated only by the torch. The room contains a large wooden chest, woven rugs, and rough stone walls as the character turns to survey the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy medieval village that transitions from the exposed exterior of a church to the sheltered interior of a cottage. It begins by tracking the character along the weathered stone walls and wooden scaffolding of a church, where a handheld torch provides the only light against the dark, stormy night. As the character rounds the corner, the scene opens into the village center, moving past a tall stone obelisk and thatched-roof huts while the rain intensifies and storm clouds fill the sky. The camera then weaves through narrow, muddy pathways lined with wicker baskets and hanging laundry before approaching the entrance of a stone dwelling. Finally, the movement carries the character inside the cottage, leaving the rain behind to reveal a dim interior featuring a large wooden chest and woven rugs illuminated by the flickering torchlight.
